message:
chore(beads): update FCP3-V3 harmonization issue states (bs5ih)

Close subtasks 4.1 and 4.2 (websocket + TLS transport migration).
Reopen parent and several subtasks (1.1, 2, 5.x, 7, 8, 9, 9.3) to
reflect remaining work discovered during integration. Large line-count
delta is due to JSONL line reordering; only 16 issues have content changes.
